rules.rule_text:
rule win_mal_PreGrabber
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects Pregrabber Plugin"
		author = "RussianPanda"
		date = "2025-2-13"
		hash = "f39319312a567fa771921d11ece66f3ce8996ba45f90d6fc89031b621535eb7e"

	strings:
		$s1 = "msgPack"
		$s2 = "HandlePreGrabber"
		$s3 = "bdos"
		$s4 = "uniqueid"
		$s5 = "mtx"
		$s6 = "install"
		$s7 = "mscoree.dll"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and all of them
}
